title: Training
subtitle: Train your leaks and master the fundamentals.

newLeaks.title: {{count}} leak(s) in your game not trained yet
newLeaks.desc: New tournaments reveal new leaks. Restart the loop: train → play → validate.

status.title: Your training
status.noSkills: You haven't trained any skill yet. Start a session below.
status.achievementsHint: Medals you earn by training, in any order, not a sequence.
status.reviewHint: Mastery dropped from lack of practice. Review to recover it.

ghost.title: Ghost Table
ghost.desc: Drills focused on your highest-error spots. The SRS system schedules automatic reviews, reinforcing your costliest patterns before they surface in real play.
ghost.f1: Spots extracted automatically from your history
ghost.f3: 25 XP per completed drill, 100 XP on mastery

leakTrainer.title: Leak Trainer
leakTrainer.desc: Canonical GTO spots aimed exactly where you lose EV. No replay of your hand: each spot is a clean scenario from your leak category, graded instantly, and the next one adapts to how you do.
leakTrainer.f1: Curriculum built from your real leaks
leakTrainer.f2: Server-side grading against the GTO range, instantly
leakTrainer.f3: Adapts: miss a spot type, train more of it

academy.title: Academy
academy.f1: Intuitive math: pot odds, EV and equity
academy.f4: XP and streak for every correct exercise

trainer.title: Leak training
trainer.subtitle: Close your leaks two complementary ways.

review.title: Review
review.desc: Real hands from your history, spaced repetition.

train.title: Train
train.desc: Synthetic spots tuned to your leaks.

trainer.hint: Review locks in what you got wrong. Train builds the pattern. Together they close the leak.

journey.title: Your journey

train.title: Train
train.tip: Train your failure points with GTO drills until you master each one. It's the practice axis: it earns XP, mastery and achievements, but does NOT touch your ELO (which comes only from real hands).

apply.title: Play
apply.tip: When you're ready, play a real tournament focusing on what you trained and import the hands. This is where practice turns into real play.

prove.title: Validate
prove.tip: The platform compares your real metrics before and after training, to show whether the improvement showed up in your actual game. Coming soon.

journey.readyMsg: You mastered your priority leaks in training. Now play a tournament and import it to see the improvement in your real game.
journey.gateHintDeveloping: Still developing: master your {{count}} most costly leaks at {{tier}} to unlock. Start with what hurts most.
journey.gateHintConsolidated: You'll unlock playing only when you master ALL {{count}} of your leaks at {{tier}}. Training a single leak isn't enough, the goal is to cover every spot.
journey.beginnerHint: Play and import your first tournaments ({{done}}/{{target}}) so the platform can measure your real failure points. Meanwhile, train the fundamentals.

proof.title: Validate learning
proof.subtitle: Your REAL GTO adherence in the category (from your hands, not the drills), before training × after you played and imported.
proof.smallSample: Small sample, not a trend yet.
proof.disclaimer: It's a comparison to your average, not proof the training caused the change. Few hands vary a lot.
